text: Travelers should always be careful in tourist areas because scams can happen anywhere. Keep your belongings close and avoid strangers who seem suspicious.
At Gare du Nord near the RER B ticket machines, a man with a laminated charity sheet asked us to sign before requesting a cash donation. Staff waved him away when we pointed to the sheet.
Paris arrival day. Coffee, rain, and one very confused metro transfer.
notes: short caption should be low confidence but not automatically high risk
